blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,106 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 59°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
